positive: A whimsical celestial raccoon silhouette, curled up comfortably on a crescent moon. The raccoon is playfully interacting with glowing, stylized constellations of stars and nebulae. Art Deco aesthetic mixed with cosmic fantasy, emphasizing clean, graphic lines and sharp contrast. The background should be deep indigo and midnight blue, with touches of shimmering gold and ethereal teal. Highly stylized, suitable for repeating apparel pattern, clean edges, vector illustration quality, negative space considered, volumetric lighting, cinematic composition, maximalist detail, golden ratio symmetry.
